arguments.content:
# Q2 2026 Work Planning Document

**Period:** April 1, 2026 – June 30, 2026  
**Generated:** April 2, 2026  
**Document Version:** 1.0

---

## 1. Quarterly Goals

### 1.1 Platform Stability & Performance
- Achieve 99.95% uptime across all production services
- Reduce API response latency by 20% through optimization initiatives
- Complete migration to the new containerized infrastructure

### 1.2 Feature Development
- Launch Project Orion v3.0 with enhanced dashboard capabilities
- Implement real-time collaboration features for enterprise clients
- Release mobile API v2 with offline sync support

### 1.3 Security & Compliance
- Complete SOC 2 Type II audit preparation
- Implement end-to-end encryption for sensitive data workflows
- Deploy automated security scanning in CI/CD pipeline

### 1.4 Team Growth & Efficiency
- Onboard 3 new backend engineers
- Reduce sprint cycle time by 15% through process improvements
- Achieve 90% automated test coverage for critical paths

---

## 2. Key Milestones

| Milestone | Target Date | Owner | Status |
|-----------|-------------|-------|--------|
| **Sprint 8 Completion** | April 10, 2026 | Alex Zhang | In Progress |
| **Q1 Retrospective & Q2 Kickoff** | April 4, 2026 | Alex Zhang | Scheduled |
| **Infrastructure Migration - Phase 1** | April 25, 2026 | Jordan Lee | Planned |
| **Orion v3.0 Beta Release** | May 15, 2026 | Sarah Chen | Planned |
| **Security Audit Completion** | May 30, 2026 | Sarah Chen | Planned |
| **Mid-Q2 Review** | May 16, 2026 | Alex Zhang | Scheduled |
| **Orion v3.0 GA Release** | June 20, 2026 | Sarah Chen | Planned |
| **Q2 Performance Review** | June 28, 2026 | Alex Zhang | Scheduled |
| **Q3 Planning Session** | June 30, 2026 | Alex Zhang | Scheduled |

---

## 3. Resource Requirements

### 3.1 Human Resources

| Role | Count | Start Date | Duration | Notes |
|------|-------|------------|----------|-------|
| Senior Backend Engineer | 2 | April 15, 2026 | Full-time | Focus: API optimization & microservices |
| DevOps Engineer | 1 | May 1, 2026 | Full-time | Focus: CI/CD & infrastructure |
| QA Automation Engineer | 1 | May 15, 2026 | Full-time | Focus: Test automation framework |
| Security Consultant | 1 | April 20, 2026 | 2 months | Focus: SOC 2 audit preparation |

### 3.2 Infrastructure & Tools

| Resource | Purpose | Estimated Cost | Approval Status |
|----------|---------|----------------|-----------------|
| Additional Kubernetes cluster (staging) | v3.0 testing environment | $2,500/month | Approved |
| NewRelic APM Pro | Performance monitoring upgrade | $800/month | Pending |
| Snyk Enterprise | Security scanning integration | $1,200/month | Pending |
| AWS Reserved Instances (1-year) | Production workload optimization | $15,000 upfront | Approved |

### 3.3 Training & Development

| Training Program | Attendees | Schedule | Budget |
|------------------|-----------|----------|--------|
| Kubernetes Advanced Certification | 3 engineers | April 2026 | $1,500 |
| Security Best Practices Workshop | All backend team | May 2026 | $2,000 |
| React Advanced Patterns | Frontend team | April 2026 | $1,200 |

---

## 4. Risk Assessment

| Risk | Impact | Probability | Mitigation Strategy |
|------|--------|-------------|---------------------|
| Key engineer unavailability during critical milestones | High | Medium | Cross-train team members; document all critical knowledge |
| Delay in new hire onboarding | Medium | Medium | Begin recruitment process early; consider contractor backup |
| Infrastructure migration downtime | High | Low | Plan migration in multiple phases; maintain rollback capability |
| Scope creep on Orion v3.0 features | Medium | High | Implement strict feature freeze by May 1; prioritize MVP |

---

## 5. Success Criteria

- **Q2 OKR 1:** 99.95% uptime (measured via monitoring dashboard)
- **Q2 OKR 2:** Orion v3.0 launched with >95% positive user feedback
- **Q2 OKR 3:** API latency reduced by ≥20% (baseline: Q1 2026 metrics)
- **Q2 OKR 4:** 3 new engineers fully onboarded and productive
- **Q2 OKR 5:** Zero critical security incidents; SOC 2 audit passed

---

## 6. Review Schedule

- **Weekly:** Sprint stand-ups (Tuesdays 9:00 AM CST)
- **Bi-weekly:** Sprint retrospectives and planning
- **Monthly:** Milestone review with stakeholders
- **Quarterly:** Q2 final review and Q3 planning (June 30, 2026)

---

*Document prepared by: MetaClaw Agent*  
*Reviewed by: Alex Zhang, Backend Tech Lead*  
*Last updated: April 2, 2026*

content.text:
Done. The Q2 2026 work planning document has been saved to **day14/20260402_q2_work_plan.md**.

**Document includes:**
- **Quarterly Goals** (4 categories: Platform Stability, Feature Development, Security & Compliance, Team Growth)
- **9 Key Milestones** with target dates and owners
- **Resource Requirements** covering:
  - 4 new roles (2 backend engineers, 1 DevOps, 1 QA automation) + 1 security consultant
  - Infrastructure & tools budget (~$19,500 + monthly costs)
  - Training budget ($4,700)
- **Risk Assessment** (4 risks with mitigation strategies)
- **5 Q2 OKRs** for success measurement
- **Review Schedule** (weekly stand-ups to quarterly reviews)
